---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new POC capability or improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Objective
What problem does this feature solve?

## Scope
- [ ] In scope
- [ ] Out of scope

## Component
Platform / Lakehouse / Spark / Airflow / Superset / Monitoring / AI / Ingestion

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Documented
- [ ] Tested locally
- [ ] Does not break baseline POC
- [ ] Includes sample command or screenshot

## Test Command
```bash
make smoke
```

## References
Add relevant documentation links.
